title: Final energy use in households within the geographical area, MWh/inhabitant (Malmö stad)
description:
[Publisher: Malmö stad] Final use of energy measured in megawatt hours (MWh) divided by the number of
inhabitants in the municipality. Refers to final use consumed by households
(single-family homes, apartment buildings, holiday homes) regardless of fuel
type, within the boundaries of the geographical area.

Source: Swedish Energy Agency and Statistics Sweden (via Kolada)
